name: komdash
description: KomDash - central management platform for Komvera IT GmbH

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @komdash/server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @komdash/shared build && pnpm --filter @komdash/server build && pnpm --filter client build
